title: sphenocleaceae
intro: The Sphenocleaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a group of plants that includes two genera, Sphenoclea and Cuspidaria. Sphenocleaceae plants are primarily found in tropical regions and are known for their unique characteristics, such as their ability to grow in a variety of environments. The family Sphenocleaceae is part of the larger classification system used to categorize and understand the diversity of plant life on Earth.
